speaker: SICINIUS
text: Bid them all home. He’s gone, and we’ll no further.

speaker: SICINIUS
text: The nobility are vexed, whom we see have sided

speaker: SICINIUS
text: In his behalf.

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Now we have shown our power,

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Let us seem humbler after it is done

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Than when it was a-doing.

speaker: SICINIUS
text: Bid them home.

speaker: SICINIUS
text: Say their great enemy is gone, and they

speaker: SICINIUS
text: Stand in their ancient strength.

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Dismiss them home.

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Here comes his mother.

speaker: SICINIUS
text: Let’s not meet her.

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Why?

speaker: SICINIUS
text: They say she’s mad.

speaker: BRUTUS
text: They have ta’en note of us. Keep on your way.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: O, you’re well met. The hoarded plague o’ th’ gods

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Requite your love!

speaker: MENENIUS
text: Peace, peace! Be not so loud.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: If that I could for weeping, you should hear—

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text:
Nay, and you shall hear some.
                 
                (
                To
                 
                Sicinius
                .
                )
               Will you be gone?

speaker: VIRGILIA
text: You shall stay too. I would I had the power

speaker: VIRGILIA
text: To say so to my husband.

speaker: SICINIUS
text: Are you mankind?

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Ay, fool, is that a shame? Note but this, fool.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Was not a man my father? Hadst thou foxship

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: To banish him that struck more blows for Rome

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Than thou hast spoken words?

speaker: SICINIUS
text: O blessèd heavens!

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: More noble blows than ever thou wise words,

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: And for Rome’s good. I’ll tell thee what—yet go.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Nay, but thou shalt stay too. I would my son

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Were in Arabia and thy tribe before him,

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: His good sword in his hand.

speaker: SICINIUS
text: What then?

speaker: VIRGILIA
text: What then?

speaker: VIRGILIA
text: He’d make an end of thy posterity.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Bastards and all.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Good man, the wounds that he does bear for Rome!

speaker: MENENIUS
text: Come, come, peace.

speaker: SICINIUS
text: I would he had continued to his country

speaker: SICINIUS
text: As he began, and not unknit himself

speaker: SICINIUS
text: The noble knot he made.

speaker: BRUTUS
text: I would he had.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: “I would he had”? ’Twas you incensed the rabble.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Cats, that can judge as fitly of his worth

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: As I can of those mysteries which heaven

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Will not have Earth to know.

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Pray, let’s go.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Now, pray, sir, get you gone.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: You have done a brave deed. Ere you go, hear this:

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: As far as doth the Capitol exceed

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: The meanest house in Rome, so far my son—

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: This lady’s husband here, this, do you see?—

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Whom you have banished, does exceed you all.

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Well, well, we’ll leave you.

speaker: SICINIUS
text: Why stay we to be baited

speaker: SICINIUS
text: With one that wants her wits?

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Take my prayers with you.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: I would the gods had nothing else to do

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: But to confirm my curses. Could I meet ’em

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: But once a day, it would unclog my heart

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Of what lies heavy to ’t.

speaker: MENENIUS
text: You have told them home,

speaker: MENENIUS
text: And, by my troth, you have cause. You’ll sup with me?

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Anger’s my meat. I sup upon myself

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: And so shall starve with feeding.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Come, let’s go.

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: Leave this faint puling, and lament as I do,

speaker: VOLUMNIA
text: In anger, Juno-like. Come, come, come.

speaker: MENENIUS
text: Fie, fie, fie!
